new_classes.label_en: Still fermented beverage produced from concentrated grape must, in containers ≤ 2 l (CN 2206 00 51)
new_classes.label_de: Anderes gegorenes Getränk (aus konzentriertem Traubenmost), nicht schäumend, in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von 2 l oder weniger (KN 2206 00 51)
new_classes.definition_en: A still (non-sparkling) fermented beverage produced from concentrated grape must (not from the natural fermentation of must of fresh grapes), presented in containers with a nominal volume of 2 litres or less. The fermentation process is typically started with yeast, and sugar may also be added. Classified under CN 2206 00 51.

new_classes.label_en: Fermented beverage produced from concentrated grape must quality
new_classes.label_de: Qualität: Gegorenes Getränk aus konzentriertem Traubenmost
new_classes.definition_en: A quality borne by a fermented beverage indicating that it was produced from concentrated grape must (as opposed to the natural fermentation of the must of fresh grapes), typically using added yeast and possibly added sugar.

coverage_explanation: The axioms capture the three main discriminating criteria for CN 2206 00 51: (1) membership in the 'other fermented beverages' class (2206), (2) production from concentrated grape must rather than natural fermentation of fresh grape must, and (3) container volume ≤ 2 litres (SmallContainer). The 'still' (non-sparkling) nature is encoded via a complement restriction on SparklingWineQuality. However, some nuance is not fully formalised: the legal note specifies that sugar may be added and yeast is typically used to start fermentation — these are production details that could in principle be modelled but lack dedicated quality classes in the current TBox and are not strictly discriminating within 2206. The note range 22060051–22060089 shares the 'concentrated grape must' criterion, so the container size restriction (≤ 2 l) is the key discriminator between 22060051 and the larger-container siblings (22060059 and beyond). The 'still' criterion distinguishes the 22060051–22060089 range from the sparkling sibling 22060031. Coverage is rated 0.75 because the production-method details (yeast, sugar addition) and the full range note shared with siblings are not independently formalised, and the SemiSparklingWineQuality complement is not included (semi-sparkling beverages in 2206 are not separately distinguished at this level).
